hero.title: Influencer-led campaigns that help brands grow faster

valueProps.heading: Everything brands need to scale with creators
valueProps.subtitle: Strategy, creative, and distribution delivered by one accountable partner

items.title: Campaign Strategy
items.body: Clear campaign goals, audience positioning, content angles, and KPI targets before production starts.

items.title: Content Production
items.body: On-brand short-form content, UGC-style assets, and creator-native scripts built for engagement and trust.

items.title: Optimization Support
items.body: Weekly iteration on hooks, messaging, and creative based on reach, watch time, and conversion signals.

features.heading: Services designed for measurable brand outcomes
features.subtitle: From launch to reporting, every step is focused on performance

items.title: Influencer Campaign Management
items.body: End-to-end support from brief creation to campaign execution and content delivery.

items.title: UGC + Short-Form Creative
items.body: Platform-native content that feels authentic and moves audiences from interest to action.

items.title: Brand Reporting
items.body: Simple reports with clear takeaways on reach, engagement, and conversion performance.

deepDive.heading: How brand partnerships work
deepDive.subtitle: A simple process from discovery to campaign scale

steps.title: Discovery + Offer Fit
steps.body: We align on your audience, product offer, and campaign goals so messaging is built around business outcomes.

steps.title: Creative + Distribution
steps.body: I produce campaign content and publish with creator-first storytelling tailored to each channel.

steps.title: Measure + Optimize
steps.body: We review performance, identify winning angles, and refine future content for stronger ROI.

plans.name: Retainer
plans.description: For teams needing ongoing creator support

items.question: What kinds of brands do you work with?
items.answer: I work with consumer-focused brands that want creator-led growth, especially DTC, lifestyle, and digital product companies.

items.question: Do you only create content or also manage strategy?
items.answer: Both. I support campaign strategy, creative production, publishing approach, and ongoing optimization.

items.question: How quickly can we launch a campaign?
items.answer: Most partnerships can begin within days after onboarding, depending on campaign scope and approval speed.

testimonials.heading: What brand partners say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by teams that value measurable creator performance

testimonials.quote: The campaign felt native to the platform and still stayed true to our brand. Engagement quality improved immediately.

testimonials.quote: We finally had a partner who could own strategy and execution without constant back-and-forth.
testimonials.name: Marcus Lee

testimonials.quote: Our paid and organic teams both used the assets. The creator content gave us stronger hooks across channels.
testimonials.name: Nina Patel
